data.title: Verify CLI output schema compatibility with ui-discover cache consumers
data.description:
## Description
Write a compatibility test verifying that @playwright/cli output format produces data compatible with the existing ui-discover cache format (manifest.json field names).

Test approach: Create mock CLI output in the expected format, feed it through the cache format validation, and assert all required fields are present with correct types. This tests the contract between CLI output and cache consumers.

TDD exemption for RED dependency: This is an integration test verifying boundary interaction (CLI output → cache format). Existing coverage from ui-discover cache validation partially covers this; this test adds the CLI-specific contract check.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-ui-discover-cache-compat.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Compatibility test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-ui-discover-cache-compat.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 2 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "^test_" tests/skills/test-ui-discover-cache-compat.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] All tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-ui-discover-cache-compat.sh 2>&1 | grep -q "passed"
- [ ] .test-index entry added
  Verify: grep -q "test-ui-discover-cache-compat" .test-index
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
